creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Hi,

as this 1.2.3 version has not yet been commited to the Ports tree, then I would suggest adding latest 1.2.6 BEADM with /boot/entropy file management:

(latest commit)
https://github.com/vermaden/beadm/commit/f5a02cdbc07a9d7511e123d22d121b218c206b93

(TAG)
https://github.com/vermaden/beadm/tree/1.2.6

Regards,
vermaden
